component.description: 600 mA, Ultralow Noise, High PSRR, RF Linear Regulator

electrical_characteristics.parameter: Accuracy over line, load, and temperature
electrical_characteristics.raw_name: Accuracy over line, load, and temperature

pin_definitions.description: Regulated Input Supply Voltage to LDO Amplifier. Bypass VREG to GND with a 10 µF or greater capacitor.
Regulated Output Voltage. Bypass VOUT to GND with a 10 µF or greater capacitor.
Low Noise Bypass Capacitor. Connect a 1 µF capacitor from the BYP pin to GND to reduce noise. Do not connect a load to ground.
Reference Sense. Connect Pin 5 to the REF pin. Do not connect Pin 5 to VOUT or GND.
Low Noise Reference Voltage Output. Bypass REF to GND with a 1 µF capacitor. Short REF_SENSE to REF for fixed output voltages. Do not connect a load to ground.
Enable. Drive EN high to turn on the regulator; drive EN low to turn off the regulator. For automatic startup, connect EN to VIN.
Regulator Input Supply Voltage. Bypass VIN to GND with a 10 µF or greater capacitor.

Exposed Pad. The exposed pad is located on the bottom of the package. The exposed pad enhances thermal performance, and it is electrically connected to GND inside the package. Connect the EP to the ground plane on the board to ensure proper operation.

logical_pins.name: BYP
logical_pins.description: Low noise bypass capacitor. Connect a 1 µF capacitor from the BYP pin to GND to reduce noise. Do not connect a load to ground.

logical_pins.name: REF_SENSE
logical_pins.description: Reference sense. Connect Pin 5 to the REF pin. Do not connect Pin 5 to VOUT or GND.

logical_pins.name: REF
logical_pins.description: Low noise reference voltage output. Bypass REF to GND with a 1 µF capacitor. Short REF_SENSE to REF for fixed output voltages. Do not connect a load to ground.

logical_pins.description: Enable. Drive EN high to turn on the regulator; drive EN low to turn off the regulator. For automatic startup, connect EN to VIN.
